vocab.example: 月光洒在湖面上，呈现出一片银色。
我们要经常和老朋友保持联系。
请告诉我你的电话号码。
大风吹来，树枝不停地摇晃。
汽车正在慢慢向后倒退。
大家争先恐后地跑向终点。
他站在那里发呆，不知道在想什么。
谁也阻拦不了他追求梦想。
听到好消息，大家不约而同地欢呼起来。
这件事处理起来非常麻烦。
我们要做一个诚实的孩子。
她有一颗善良的心，经常帮助别人。
童年的生活给我留下了美好的回忆。

sentences.text: 早晨，妈妈带我去公园散步。
sentences.description: Walking in the park in the morning.

sentences.text: 他站在那里呆住了，不知道该说什么。
sentences.description: Standing blankly, not knowing what to say.

sentences.text: 同学们争先恐后地跑出教室，去参加活动。
sentences.description: Students rushing out of the classroom.

sentences.text: 这个联系号码是错误的，请核对。
他的善良打动了在场的所有人。

银色.zh: 月光下，河面泛着银色的光芒。
银色.en: Under moonlight, the river surface glimmers with silver rays.

银色.zh: 爸爸买了一辆银色的轿车。
银色.en: Dad bought a silver sedan car.

银色.zh: 舞台上飘落着银色的彩带。
银色.en: Silver ribbons drifted down on the stage.

银色.zh: 她戴着一条银色的项链，非常漂亮。
银色.en: She wears a silver necklace, which is very beautiful.

银色.zh: 飞机的银色机翼在阳光下闪闪发亮。
银色.en: The plane's silver wings glitter bright in the sunlight.

联系.zh: 毕业后，我们依然保持着紧密的联系。
联系.en: After graduation, we still maintain close contact.

联系.zh: 如果有最新进展，请及时与我联系。
联系.en: If there is latest progress, please contact me in time.

联系.zh: 这两件事之间有着必然的联系。
联系.en: There is an inevitable connection between these two matters.

联系.zh: 请留下一名紧急联系人的电话号码。
联系.en: Please leave an emergency contact person's phone number.

联系.zh: 通过网络，我们可以方便地和远方朋友联系。
联系.en: Through the network, we can easily connect with distant friends.

号码.zh: 请告诉我你的手机号码是多少。
号码.en: Please tell me what your mobile phone number is.

号码.zh: 办手续时需要按号码排队等待。
号码.en: When processing procedures, line up and wait according to numbers.

号码.zh: 我不小心记错了朋友的电话号码。
号码.en: I accidentally misremembered my friend's phone number.

号码.zh: 运动员的背上贴着参赛号码。
号码.en: Athletes have entry numbers affixed to their backs.

号码.zh: 请仔细核对中奖号码是否匹配。
号码.en: Please carefully verify whether winning numbers match.

早晨.zh: 清晨阳光洒满大地，早晨的空气真清新。
早晨.en: Early morning sunlight covers the earth, and morning air is truly fresh.

早晨.zh: 我有早晨起来跑步健身的习惯。
早晨.en: I have the habit of rising early in the morning to jog and exercise.

早晨.zh: 早晨的公园里有许多老人在晨练。
早晨.en: There are many elderly morning-exercising in the park in the morning.

早晨.zh: 祝你有一个美好的早晨！
早晨第一缕阳光照进了房间。
早晨.en: The first ray of morning sunlight shone into the room.

摇晃.zh: 大风刮过，路边树木开始剧烈摇晃。
摇晃.en: Strong wind blew past, and roadside trees began to shake violently.

摇晃.zh: 地震发生时，楼房产生了明显的摇晃。
摇晃.en: When the earthquake occurred, buildings produced noticeable shaking.

摇晃.zh: 小船在波浪中上下摇晃着前进。
摇晃.en: The small boat advanced, rocking up and down among waves.

摇晃.zh: 请不要用力摇晃这棵幼苗。
摇晃.en: Please do not shake this young seedling hard.

摇晃.zh: 他摇晃着手中的饮料瓶，将液体混合。
摇晃.en: He shook the beverage bottle in hand to mix liquid.

倒退.zh: 汽车正在缓缓向后倒退。
倒退.en: The car is slowly reversing backward.

倒退.zh: 不努力学习，成绩就会倒退。
倒退.en: Without studying hard, grades will regress.

倒退.zh: 看到前面的危险，人们纷纷向后倒退。
倒退.en: Seeing danger ahead, people stepped back one after another.

倒退.zh: 历史的潮流是不可倒退的。
倒退.en: The tide of history cannot be reversed.

倒退.zh: 观察窗外，树木仿佛在快速倒退。
倒退.en: Observing outside windows, trees seem to be rapidly retreating.

争先恐后.zh: 听到放学铃声，同学们争先恐后地跑出教室。
争先恐后.en: Hearing the dismissal bell, students scrambled out of the classroom.

争先恐后.zh: 顾客们争先恐后地购买打折商品。
争先恐后.en: Customers rushed to buy discounted goods.

争先恐后.zh: 在回答问题时，大家争先恐后地举手。
争先恐后.en: When answering questions, everyone vied to raise their hands first.

争先恐后.zh: 运动员们争先恐后，向终点发起冲刺。
争先恐后.en: Athletes jostled for the lead, sprinting toward the finish line.

争先恐后.zh: 参观者争先恐后地进入展厅欣赏画作。
争先恐后.en: Visitors scrambled to enter the exhibition room to enjoy paintings.

飘.en: Colored flags drifted softly in the wind.

飘.zh: 炊烟从农舍的屋顶缓慢飘出。
飘.en: Kitchen smoke drifted slowly from farmhouses' roofs.

飘.zh: 雪花纷纷扬扬地从空中飘落。
飘.en: Snowflakes drifted down in abundance from the sky.

飘.zh: 厨房里飘出了一股诱人的饭菜香味。
飘.en: An inviting scent of dishes drifted out from the kitchen.

飘.zh: 气球脱手后向着高空飘去。
飘.en: The balloon drifted toward high altitude after slipping out of hand.

呆.zh: 听到这个突如其来的消息，他当场呆住了。
呆.en: Hearing this sudden news, he froze on the spot.

呆.zh: 周末我喜欢呆在家里看看书。
呆.en: On weekends, I like staying at home reading books.

呆.zh: 他呆呆地看着前方，一言不发。
呆.en: He stared blankly forward without saying a word.

呆.zh: 别发呆了，赶紧抓紧时间做作业。
呆.en: Stop daydreaming, hurry up and seize time to do homework.
The look in the eyes appears somewhat dazed.

不约而同.zh: 听到这个好消息，大家不约而同地鼓起掌来。
不约而同.en: Hearing this good news, everyone clapped in unison without prior agreement.

不约而同.zh: 看到小丑的演出，观众们不约而同地笑了。
不约而同.en: Seeing the clown's performance, the audience coincided in laughing.

不约而同.zh: 走到岔路口，我们不约而同地停下了脚步。
不约而同.en: Reaching the fork in the road, we stopped simultaneously without prior agreement.

不约而同.zh: 两个人不约而同地穿了同款的衣服。
不约而同.en: The two people happened to wear the same styled clothing without planning.

不约而同.zh: 大家不约而同地伸出援助之手。
不约而同.en: Everyone coincidentally extended a helping hand.

麻烦.zh: 真抱歉，给您带来这么多麻烦。
麻烦.en: Really sorry for bringing you so much trouble.

麻烦.zh: 遇到麻烦时，要冷静寻找解决办法。
麻烦.en: When encountering trouble, stay calm to find solutions.

麻烦.zh: 这道题处理起来非常麻烦。
麻烦.en: Handling this problem is extremely troublesome.

麻烦.zh: 麻烦你顺手帮我把门关上，谢谢。
麻烦.en: May I trouble you to kindly close the door for me, thanks.

麻烦.zh: 为了避免不必要的麻烦，请按规定办事。
麻烦.en: To avoid unnecessary trouble, please act according to rules.

诚实.zh: 诚实是一个人非常重要的道德品质。
诚实.en: Honesty is a very important moral quality in a person.

诚实.zh: 诚实的孩子总是能赢得大家的信任。
诚实.en: Honest children can always win everyone's trust.

诚实.zh: 面对错误，我们要诚实地勇敢承担。
诚实.en: Facing mistakes, we must honestly and courageously take responsibility.

诚实.zh: 他为人诚实守信，从不说谎。
诚实.en: He is honest and trustworthy, never telling lies.

诚实.zh: 做人要讲究诚实，不能弄虚作假。
诚实.en: One should value honesty and not practice fraud.

善良.zh: 她是一个心地善良、乐于助人的女孩。
善良.en: She is a kind-hearted and helpful girl.

善良.zh: 善良的行为总能给社会带来温暖。
善良.en: Kind actions can always bring warmth to society.

善良.zh: 保持一颗善良的心，善待身边每个人。
善良.en: Maintain a kind heart and treat everyone around well.

善良.zh: 他的善良打动了在场的每一个人。
我们要从小培养善良的品质。
善良.en: We should cultivate kind qualities from an early age.

回忆.zh: 看着老照片，勾起了我许多美好的回忆。
回忆.en: Looking at old photos evoked many beautiful memories in me.

回忆.zh: 童年生活是我记忆中最珍贵的回忆。
回忆.en: Childhood life is the most precious memory in my recollection.

回忆.zh: 老爷爷正在向我们回忆他年轻时的故事。
回忆.en: Grandpa is recalling stories of his youth for us.

回忆.zh: 这次旅行留下了难忘的回忆。
回忆.en: This trip left behind unforgettable memories.

回忆.zh: 痛苦的往事他不愿再去回忆。
回忆.en: Painful past events he is unwilling to recall again.

阻拦.zh: 无论遇到什么困难，都阻拦不住我们前进的脚步。
阻拦.en: No matter what difficulties encountered, nothing can block our steps forward.

阻拦.zh: 警察拉起了警戒线，阻拦人群靠近。
阻拦.en: Police set up caution tape to impede crowds from approaching.

阻拦.zh: 勇敢的战士阻拦住了敌人的进攻。
大雨阻拦了我们原定的出行计划。
阻拦.en: Heavy rain obstructed our original trip plan.

阻拦.zh: 没有任何力量能够阻拦科学的发展。
阻拦.en: No force can hold back the development of science.
